Whale Safe Impact

Author

Emily Nazario

Published

April 6, 2026

Voluntary Vessel Speed Reduction (VSR) Zone & Whale Safe background

VSR data notes

San Francisco data does not include the Monterey Bay National Marine Sanctuary, which was added to the VSR program in 2023. The Whale Safe system that was launched in San Francisco was designed to give whale presence in the San Francisco portion of the VSR zones so we are reporting on them separately here for now. The Monterey Bay stats come from a different data pipeline and the offseason stats are not tracked as regularly.

Whale Safe System Launch Dates

Southern California: September 17, 2020

San Francisco: September 21, 2022

Vessel Speed Reduction Zones

Vessel Speed Reduction Season Dates:

Southern California:

  • June 4 - December 31, 2018:

  • May 15 - December 15, 2019

  • May 15 - December 15, 2020

  • May 15 - December 15, 2021

  • May 1 - December 15, 2022

  • May 1 - December 15, 2023

  • May 1 , 2024 - January 15, 2025

San Francisco

  • May 1 - November 15, 2019

  • May 1 - November 15, 2020

  • May 1 - November 15, 2021

  • May 1 - December 15, 2022

  • May 1 - December 15, 2023

  • May 1 , 2024 - January 15, 2025

WPR data notes

Blue whale model data might have been retroactively filled in after periods where the server was down. We don’t have this tracked in our data so there may be days where the Whale Presence Rating didn’t take the blue whale model value into account.

Each species has a threshold for each data stream see Methodology for what is considered low-high (0-1). The Whale Presence Rating considers the highest rating of any of the data streams over 5 days. Two species need to have a high rating in order for the overall Whale Presence Rating to be ‘Very High’.

Blue whale data stream time series

Across metrics, data points represent the year-month average for blue whales. Light grey shaded regions represent seasons when the VSR is active, while the striped regions represent when data was unavailable from the respective source.

For the acoustics panels, year-month averages were done by assigning a “Low Rating” a 1, a “Medium Rating” a 2, a “High Rating” a 3, and “offline” an NA. Then, averages were taken of these scores, and the means were plotted as they fit across the ranges of these three bins.

Proportion of days per region data was offline
Region (n = all days) Data system Percent days offline
San Francisco (n = 846) Acoustics 56.03%
Southern California (n = 1579) Acoustics 24.64%
San Francisco (n = 846) Whale Watch 20.09%
Southern California (n = 1579) Whale Watch 11.40%

Revised analysis: GLMM

Sightings ~ SDM

ggplot(wpr, aes(bwmv, s_bluecount)) + 
geom_point(aes(color = zone)) + 
geom_smooth(data = wpr, aes(bwmv, s_bluecount), color = "black", method = "lm") + 
geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(color = zone)) + 
theme_minimal()
wpr <- wpr %>% mutate(j_day = format(date_pt, "%j"), 
                      blu_acou_deci = blue_acoustic_percent/100)
wpr$year_c <- wpr$year - mean(wpr$year) #center to make intercept value more interpretable

#sightings ~ sdm
sight_sdm <- glmmTMB(s_bluecount ~ bwmv:zone + mo + (1|year_c), 
                    ziformula = ~1,
                    family = poisson,
                    data = wpr)

summary(sight_sdm)
 Family: poisson  ( log )
Formula:          s_bluecount ~ bwmv:zone + mo + (1 | year_c)
Zero inflation:               ~1
Data: wpr

      AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
   1772.8    1806.6    -880.4    1760.8      2074 

Random effects:

Conditional model:
 Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
 year_c (Intercept) 1.394    1.181   
Number of obs: 2080, groups:  year_c, 5

Conditional model:
                   Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)        -0.17055    0.62276  -0.274    0.784    
mo                 -0.07563    0.04021  -1.881    0.060 .  
bwmv:zoneSF VSR     1.29831    0.30024   4.324 1.53e-05 ***
bwmv:zoneSocal VSR  2.07760    0.30000   6.925 4.35e-12 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Zero-inflation model:
            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)   2.3244     0.1174   19.79   <2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
sight_sdm_resid <- simulateResiduals(sight_sdm)
plot(sight_sdm_resid)
emtrends(sight_sdm, pairwise ~ zone, var = "bwmv")
$emtrends
 zone      bwmv.trend  SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
 SF VSR          1.30 0.3 Inf      0.71      1.89
 Socal VSR       2.08 0.3 Inf      1.49      2.67

Confidence level used: 0.95 

$contrasts
 contrast           estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
 SF VSR - Socal VSR   -0.779 0.135 Inf  -5.758 <0.0001

Acoustics ~ SDM

ggplot(wpr, aes(bwmv, blu_acou_deci)) + 
geom_point(aes(color = zone)) + 
geom_smooth(data = wpr, aes(bwmv, blu_acou_deci), color = "black", method = "lm", se = FALSE) + 
geom_smooth(method = "lm", aes(color = zone), se = FALSE) + 
theme_minimal()
#acoustics ~ sdm
acou_sdm <- glmmTMB(blu_acou_deci ~ bwmv:zone + mo + (1|year_c), 
                    ziformula = ~zone,
                    family = beta_family(link = "logit"),
                    data = wpr) 

summary(acou_sdm)
 Family: beta  ( logit )
Formula:          blu_acou_deci ~ bwmv:zone + mo + (1 | year_c)
Zero inflation:                 ~zone
Data: wpr

      AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
   1055.6    1097.4    -519.8    1039.6      1371 

Random effects:

Conditional model:
 Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
 year_c (Intercept) 0.1412   0.3757  
Number of obs: 1379, groups:  year_c, 5

Dispersion parameter for beta family (): 4.12 

Conditional model:
                   Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)        -1.54151    0.31293  -4.926 8.39e-07 ***
mo                  0.06027    0.02855   2.111   0.0348 *  
bwmv:zoneSF VSR     0.40367    0.21939   1.840   0.0658 .  
bwmv:zoneSocal VSR -0.84690    0.20479  -4.136 3.54e-05 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Zero-inflation model:
              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)    -0.1798     0.1179  -1.525    0.127    
zoneSocal VSR   1.6115     0.1407  11.451   <2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
acou_sdm_resid <- simulateResiduals(acou_sdm)
plot(acou_sdm_resid)
plogis(fixef(acou_sdm)$cond["(Intercept)"]) #baseline for SF VSR at mean year, mean month, and bwmv = 0
(Intercept) 
  0.1763159 
emtrends(acou_sdm, pairwise ~ zone, var = "bwmv")
$emtrends
 zone      bwmv.trend    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL
 SF VSR         0.404 0.219 Inf   -0.0263     0.834
 Socal VSR     -0.847 0.205 Inf   -1.2483    -0.446

Confidence level used: 0.95 

$contrasts
 contrast           estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
 SF VSR - Socal VSR     1.25 0.247 Inf   5.073 <0.0001
